title: Adding Photos to Scheduled Social Media Posts
excerpt:
Hi all, 
We are using the LinkedIn integration to schedule posts. I’d like to add pictures to those posts but it’s currently not supported. I’d love for the post AND photo to be scheduled and published. Is this an issue …

posts.author: LizW (Liz Whitehead)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,
We are using the LinkedIn integration to schedule posts. I’d like to add pictures to those posts but it’s currently not supported. I’d love for the post AND photo to be scheduled and published. Is this an issue for anyone else? Are other people using other integrations to make that happen? I’m thinking specifically for LinkedIn though I’m curious about other integrations too.

posts.author: Ggsvwf (Gerald Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m having the same issue. Did you ever find a resolution?

posts.author: GaryN (Gary Nightingale Creative)
posts.cookedHtml: Any update on this? Not being able to post images is a real pain.

posts.author: dharmik (Dharmik Jagodana)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have you tried adding the Thumbnail URL to share both the link and the image?

This could resolve the issue with adding an image, but the limitation is that you’ll only be able to include one image per post.

posts.author: Woitake (Woitake)
posts.cookedHtml:
Woitake:

I just used a file column to upload the images and synced it with an automation that pushes everything to another board where I track all the scheduled posts. Works pretty smoothly.

Had a similar hassle while managing posts for a project that featured digital picture frame-style products—photos really make a difference, but scheduling tools often miss that part. Some folks use third-party apps like Buffer or Hootsuite, which sometimes handle images better, but it depends on the platform.

posts.author: 0xm3t1 (Flynn .Is)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, you might want to check out Publisher, a monday.com app built specifically for social publishing. It supports scheduling posts with images (and videos) across multiple platforms, including LinkedIn (Including LinkedIn Page).

Publisher gives you a full publishing workflow inside monday.com — write your post, attach the media, pick the channel, and schedule it all in one place.

If you’re mainly posting to LinkedIn but also curious about other channels, Publisher handles them too (Facebook, Instagram, Tiktok, etc.), so you can keep everything in one board. Give it a free try
